---
title: "Datavis Musings"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed:
    title: "Datavis Musings"
    description: "Thoughts on data visualization, statistical graphics, and R programming by Michael Friendly"
    items: 20
page-layout: full
---

Thoughts on data visualization, statistical graphics, R programming, and the history of data visualization.
